amazon.title: Amazon
amazon.content:
General Changes

 

Skill Trees

Passive and Magic

Inner Sight

  • Now also applies 5 + 1% per soft point of physical damage reduction to enemies
  • This change affects A1 Mercenary

Penetrate

  • Now also grants 6 + 2% per hard point elemental penetration (fire, cold, lightning, poison)

 

Bow and Crossbow

Magic Arrow

  • Gains 1 missile per 3 hard points in Multiple Shot
  • Gains Flat Magic Damage Per Level

Fire Arrow

  • Gains 1 missile per 3 hard points in Multiple Shot
  • Min/Max Starting Damage Increased
  • Gains increased fire damage per level

Cold Arrow

  • Gains 1 missile per 3 hard points in Multiple Shot
  • Min/Max Starting Damage Increased
  • Gains increased fire damage per level

Multiple Shot

  • Now deals full weapon damage
  • Synergy reduced to keep the overall damage at similar values

 

Javelin and Spear

Jab

  • Added 6% Damage Synergy from Impale and Fend
  • Gains Flat Physical Damage Per Level

Poison Javelin

  • Missile Speed increased and the trail isn't as dense
  • Poison Length is now a flat 2 seconds
  • Damage adjusted so the skill is effective at single target fighting

Impale

  • Skill Reworked to use attack speed and normal attack animations
  • Fires a missile in a straight line when attacking that damages enemies
  • No longer costs increased durability
  • Now uses attack rating and is not flagged for “Always Hits”
  • Added 6% Damage Synergy from Jab and Fend
  • Gains Flat Physical Damage Per Level

Plague Javelin

  • Poison Clouds are bigger and spread faster for AoE clearing
  • Damage reduced  to facilitate the goal of being an AoE focused skill

Fend

  • Added 6% Damage Synergy with Jab and Impale
  • Gains Flat Physical Damage Per Level

assassin.title: Assassin
assassin.content:
General Changes

 

Skill Trees

Shadow Discipline Skills

Shadow Warrior

  • Mana cost reduced

Shadow Master

  • Mana cost reduced

Martial Arts Skills 

  • Charge duration increased to 30s from 15s
  • Charge duration shows in tooltip

Fist of Fire

  • No longer converts physical damage to fire damage for consistency with other elemental attacks

Trap Skills

Blade Sentinel

  • Now does 100% of weapon damage from 75%
  • Damage bonuses doubles at higher skill levels to keep it competitive in higher difficulties.
  • Blade Sentinel can now fly so it won't have to path around terrain
  • No longer has a casting delay
  • Has a scaling mana curve
  • Move speed increased by 50%
  • Can now hit every 15 frames (was 25)
  • Now gains AR and AR per lvel

Blade Fury

  • Has been reworked and is no longer a channeled attack
  • Now throws a shuriken that bounces to up to 1 nearby enemies (1 bounce limit doesn't scale)
  • Shuriken throw rate is based on attack speed
  • Gains 1 projectile per 8 soft skill levels after level 16. (12 total at skill level 100)
  • Initial throw projectiles can pierce enemies
  • Carries weapon damage and modifiers
  • Dual-wielding doesn't do anything, main hand weapon only is used.
  • Requires h2h or knives

Blade Shield

  • Damage curves increased at higher skill levels
  • Mana cost reduced
  • Delay between hits reduced
  • Can now hit every 15 frames (was 25)
  • Now gains AR and AR per level

barbarian.title: Barbarian
barbarian.content:
General Changes

Bash, Double Swing, Double Throw, Frenzy, Tectonic Slam, Carnage, Berserk and Whirlwind now have a small amount of added flat damage/level to make +skills a bit more useful and smooth out the leveling process.

Skill Trees

Warcries

Howl

  • Has been reworked into a short-range cone effect that does physical damage
  • Synergy bonuses from all shout based skills

War Cry

  • Now deals a small echoing shockwave from each target hit for a percentage of the skills damage
  • Skill curve has been redone
  • Synergy bonus extended to include the other Shout-based skills

Battle Cry

  • No longer reduces enemy defense
  • Now reduces enemy physical damage reduction
  • These changes also apply to the 2H Act 5 merc that uses Battle Cry

Shout

  • Duration synergy extended to include all Shout-based skills

Battle Orders

  • Duration synergy extended to include all Shout-based skills

Battle Command

  • Duration synergy extended to include all Shout-based skills

Deadly Treasures (Replaced Mace Mastery)

  • Replaces Mace Mastery
  • Gain 25 + 4% per level MF
  • Gain 41.25 + 6.6% per level GF

Combat Masteries -> Masteries and Throwing Skills

Masteries

Melee Mastery (Replaced Sword Mastery)

  • Melee Mastery has condensed Sword, Axe, Mace, Polearm, and Spear Mastery into one Skill

Throwing Mastery

  • Required level to 1 from 6

Shield Mastery (Replaced Axe Mastery)

  • Increases Faster Block Rate
  • Increases Chance to Block %
Throwing Skills
  • Each skill requires a throwing weapon and doesn't use a second throwing weapon though they can be used while dual-wielding.

Unstoppable Force (Replaces Pole-Arm Mastery)

  • Level 1
  • High weapon damage, slow moving projectile that pierces enemies and always hits
  • Hits the same enemy multiple times

Winters Gambit (Replaces Spear-Mastery)

  • Level 12
  • Throws multiple projectiles that travel for a short distance ignoring collision and then home in on random "nearby" enemies and zips to them to deal weapon damage and cold damage
    • Inspired by Storm Crows from Median by Brother Laz
      • Skill that engages you and rewards positioning, don't hug the monster unless it is alone if you want to hit it. The skill likes to chase further enemies.

Chasm Break (Replaces Increased Stamina)

  • Level 24
  • Throw a weapon that appears to teleport into an enemy and causes of rocks to fall on them for a short period dealing periodic weapon damage to enemies nearby the target
    • Credit to ESR celestialray for the missiles.txt entry and Median by Brother Laz for the inspiration from Rock Shower

Madawcs Fury (Replaces Grim Ward)

  • Level 30
  • Enhances player throwing damage
  • Adds flat cold damage to attacks
  • Enhances AR
    • Gives you a cool glow created for the skill

Combat Skills

Double Swing

  • Required level is now 1
  • Synergies have changed to Double Throw and Frenzy

Stun →Tectonic Slam

  • Replaces Stun Skill
  • Tectonic Slam slams your target and causes a shockwave that unearths the ground, damaging the target and enemies behind it
  • Tectonic Slam cannot trigger Leech effects, but it can proc Chance To Cast (CtC) skills
  • Tectonic Slam requires a "Slam" weapon. Slam weapons include: Two-handed Swords, Maces, Axes, Polearms, or Staves
  • Unaffected by Slow Missiles
  • Fires 8 rows of spikes that deal 100% of weapon damage
  • Has a 20% damage synergy with Bash
  • seismictrail.json missile provided by hida8633734

Leap

  • Baseline minimum distance increased from 4 to 8 (as in D2R 2.4)
  • Speed of the leap motion increased to 175% (as in D2R 2.4)
  • Leap now has a minimum jump height and duration
  • Tooltip updated to now display Knockback Radius
  • Tooltip updated to now display Leap motion speed
  • Leap gains +5% speed from itself as synergy
  • Leap is now uninterruptible

Leap Attack

  • Speed of the leap motion increased to 175% (as in D2R 2.4)
  • Leap synergy added to Leap Attack. Increases leap motion by +2%
  • Leap Attack now has a minimum jump height and duration
  • Attack Rating baseline increased from 50% to 100%
  • Attack Rating per level increased from 15% to 20%
  • Tooltip updated to now display Leap motion speed
  • The Barbarian now deals extra physical damage to surrounding enemies within a range of 4.6 yards when landing from a Leap Attack. Damage scales per level
  • Leap synergy bonus applies to the AoE damage in addition to the attack (added +10% damage from Whirlwind synergy for it to not fall off too quickly)
  • Increased mana cost of Leap Attack from 9 to 10
  • Leap Attack will be performed even when targeting adjacent enemies (used to perform a basic attack)
  • Leap Attack is now uninterruptible

Concentrate → Carnage

  • Reworked into a new skill named carnage which spawns a gore filled tornado when you strike an enemy and uses their bones as projectiles
  • Fires 8 spikes out in a small nova that then seek out nearby enemies and strike them
  • Has a 10% damage synergy with Bash and Berserk

Whirlwind

  • AR/lvl for Whirlwind bumped to match Berserk and Tectonic Slam

druid.title: Druid
druid.content:
General Changes

  • All skill pre-requisites have been removed

Summon Skills

Raven

  • Reworked to be a more "active" skill for a summoner druid
  • Now deals splash damage
  • Now has synergy with all druid summon skills
  • Cap raised to 10 and hits reduced to 3
  • Velocity adjusted by +5
  • Small amount of attack speed gained per level

Spirit Wolf

  • No longer has synergy with Dire Wolf or Grizzly. Previous synergies are now baked into the skill scaling
  • Max wolves has been reduced from 10 to 5
  • Now has a chance to cast cold twisters on hit
  • Now inherits the players cold pierce stat
  • Now has a synergy with all cold and wind elemental skills

Dire Wolf

  • No longer has synergy with Spirit Wolf or Grizzly. Previous synergies are now baked into the skill scaling
  • Max wolves has been reduced from 5 to 3
  • Now deals fire damage on hit
  • Now has a chance to cast fire storm on hit
  • Now inherits the players fire pierce stat
  • Now has a synergy with all fire elemental skills and fire claws
  • Tooltip corrected for max wolves

Grizzly

  • No longer has synergy with Spirit Wolf or Dire Wolf. Previous synergies are now baked into the skill scaling
  • Max bears remains at 2 at 10 hard skill points. You can't separate a bonded pair
  • Now has a chance to cast shockwave on hit
  • Now has a synergy with all physical shapeshift skills

Oak Sage

  • HP% Aura now scales from base 5 to 100% max

 

 

 

Heart of the Wolverine

  • Reworked to be more attractive to all builds
  • %DMG per reduced
  • Now gains %IAS and %FCR per hard point

 

Spirit of the Barbs

  • No longer provides Thorns aura
  • Now provides an aura that reduces fire, lightning, cold, poison, and physical resistance of nearby enemies

 

 

Creeper Vine

  • Now inherits the Player's poison pierce stat
  • Synergies are now 15% from Rabies and Toxic Fangs from 20% from Rabies

 

 

 

Carrion Vine

  • Now regenerates both HP and Mana at increased rates
  • Grants a 5 replenish and 5% mana regeneration aura that gains an additional 1 per level up to 25%

 

 

Solar Creeper

  • Now does an AOE physical dot damage based on the floor animation of vines
  • Synergizes with all summons for +10% damage.

 

Elemental Skills

  • All elemental skills now have a synergy bonus soft cap of 25 points and an uncapped bonus past 25 points at a reduced rate
  • Synergy bonus was adjusted so that the bulk of the previous synergies (25-75 points) are now in the first 25 points
  • Synergies were changed from the previous limitations to now work with ALL elemental skills (e.g. Fissure can gain more fire damage from Tornado)

Firestorm

 

 

 

Molten Boulder

 

 

 

Fissure

 

 

 

 

Volcano

 

 

 

Armageddon

 

 

 

Arctic Blast

 

 

 

 

Cyclone Armor

 

 

 

Twister

 

 

 

Tornado

 

 

 

Hurricane

 

 

 

Shapeshifting Skills

  • Frozen/Chilling/Shiver Armor, Enchant, Energy Shield, Battle Cry, Bone Armor, Cyclone Armor, Burst of Speed, Fade, Venom, Holy shield, Find Potion, Find Item are now castable in druid shapeshift

Lycanthropy

  • No longer increases shapeshifting duration

 

 

Werewolf

  • No longer has a limited duration

 

 

Werebear

  • No longer has a limited duration

 

 

Feral Rage

  • Duration now scales with levels in Lycanthropy
  • Minor flat damage added across all skill levels

 

Maul

  • Duration now scales with levels in Lycanthropy
  • Minor flat damage added across all skill levels

 

Fire Claws

  • Fire Claws reworked into an AOE on-hit Fire-based attack that doesn't work with the splash charm

 

 

Rabies

  • Plague now also reduces enemy poison resistance by 20%
  • Synergies updated to 15% from Poison Creeper and Toxic Fangs from 20% from Poison Creeper

 

 

Hunger → Toxic Fangs

  • Reworked into high damage single target killing poison skill
  • Has a 15% synergy with Rabies and Poison Creeper

 

Shockwave

 

 

 

Fury

 

 

Polar Bear Form

Granted by the set: Panda's Polar Adventure

 

Base IAS No Weapon

 

 

Skills Available 

Feral Rage, Maul, Rabies, Fire Claws, Hunger, Shockwave, Polar Claws

necromancer.title: Necromancer
necromancer.content:
General Changes

  • All curse durations normalized to a maximum of 5 seconds, Terrify and Charm, or 25 seconds, the rest.
  • All curses prerequisite skills removed

Skill Trees

Summoning Skills

Golem Mastery

  • Now provides a bonus to each golems unique aura as well as providing base stat increases

Raise Skeleton

  • Now deals 50% of damage as splash damage to enemies surrounding their targets
  • Maximum count is now capped at 14
  • 10% damage synergy with Skeleton Mastery added

Raise Skeleton Mage

  • Reworked and given new missiles. Cold > Glacial Spike, Fire > Fire Ball, Lightning > Lightning, Poison > Bone Spear (as physical damage)
  • Synergy moved to missiles off of skill level to facilitate scaling into the end game properly
  • 10% damage synergy with Raise Skeleton added
  • 5% damage synergy with Skeleton Mastery added

Clay Golem

  • Reworked so that synergies are baked into the base skill for damage and attack rating
  • Can now summon 2 at skill level 20+
  • Now casts “Defiance” aura whose level is determined by hard points up to a max level of 13
  • Gains flat damage as a synergy with Golem Mastery

Blood Golem

  • Reworked so that synergies are baked into the base skill for damage and attack rating
  • Can now summon 2 at skill level 20+
  • Now casts “Blood Magic” aura on the player causing spells to cost life instead of mana (this was removed from Succubi and Baal).
  • Now casts “Magic Mastery Aura” which benefits skills that deal magic damage 10 + 1% per level to maximum of 50% (Necromancer spells only for now.)
  • Gains flat damage as a synergy with Golem Mastery

Iron Golem

  • Reworked so that synergies are baked into the base skill for damage and attack rating
  • Aura changes from flat damage return to percent damage returned with a base of 150 + 15% per soft level
  • Gains flat damage as a synergy with Golem Mastery

Fire Golem

  • Reworked so that synergies are baked into the base skill for health, damage and attack rating
  • Can now summon 2 at skill level 20+
  • Now casts an aura that grants allies flat fire damage instead of Holy Fire aura

Revive

  • Revives are no longer bound by a duration
  • Revive monster velocity decreased from +200% to +130%

Poison and Bone Skills

Teeth

  • Synergy with Energy added at 1% damager per Energy
  • Skill synergies reduced from 15 to 13%
  • Skill curve base damage increased by 110% by skill level 29+

Bone Spear

  • Synergy with Energy added at 1% damager per Energy
  • Skill synergies from 8% to 10%
  • Can gain an additional projectile from magic/rare/crafted Wands and/or Necromancer heads
  • Base damage increased by 40% by skill level 29+

Bone Spirit

  • Damage curve increased by 100%
  • Synergies increased from 8 to 10%

Poison Dagger

  • Reworked into a single target high damage skill
  • Poison duration is static at 3 seconds
  • Does a small radius splash of poison damage around the target struck

Poison Explosion → Poison Volley

  • Reworked into a bow/crossbow/throwing knife/throwing axe skill
  • Uses attack speed
  • Fires 2 projectiles base and gains an additional projectile for every 3 hard points points in Poison Nova capping out at 5 total
  • Deals poison damage with a static length of 2 seconds
  • Synergies increased from 15 to 20% with Poison Dagger and Poison Nova

Poison Nova

  • Synergies increased from 10 to 15%
  • Damage curve adjusted to gain more up front and a little less at higher levels in order to make the skill useful on aquisition

Bone Armor

  • Grants 50 flat defense and 50 additional flat defense per level

Bone Wall

  • Initial duration reduced from 24 seconds to 10 seconds

Bone Prison

  • Initial duration reduced from 24 seconds to 10 seconds

Curses

Amplify Damage

  • Flat enemy physical resistance reduction changed from 100% flat to 25% + 2% per soft level with a maximum of 100%

Weaken

  • Physical damage de-buff reduced from -33 to -10% base still scaling by 1% per soft level
  • Now also applies - enemy magic resistances at 15 + 2% per soft level capped at 100%

Decrepify

  • Effect reduced from 50% to 25% total slow, damage, and negative enemy physical resistance

paladin.title: Paladin
paladin.content:
General Changes

A flat damage bonus has been added to all physical skills to aid in the leveling process and smooth out bad luck finding new weapons.

Skill Trees

Defensive Aura Skills

 

Offensive Aura Skills

Holy Fire

  • Radius capped at 30 or about the size of the screen
  • Synergies reduced from 10 to 8% and 21 to 16%
  • No longer requires Might

Holy Freeze

  • Radius capped at 30 or about the size of the screen

Holy Shock

  • Radius capped at 30 or about the size of the screen

Sanctuary

  • No longer requires Holy Freeze
  • Now damages all enemy types and no longer knocks them back
  • Removed sparkling ground effect because it was causing crashes because enemies would produce it as well
  • Now applies - enemy magic resistance while active base 10 + 1% per soft level

Conviction

  • Now requires Holy Shock

Combat Skills

Vengeance

  • Vengeance reworked to apply scaling tri elemental damage based on skill level and synergies and works with the splash charm
  • No longer reliant on weapon damage for elemental damage
  • Synergies changed from Resist Fire, Coldm Lightning, and Salvation to Holy Fire, Freeze, Shock, and Conviction.
  • Synergies increased from 2 to 10% for the 3 elemental auras, and to 15 from 10% for Conviction

Holy Bolt

  • Now damages all enemy types
  • Can now fire an additional projectile when wearing a magic/rare/crafted Scepter or Auric Shield with the +1 Holy Bolt Projectiles Property
  • Damage curve adjusted at skill levels 24+ to scale into Hell difficulty
  • Synergies reduced from 50 to 30% due to the skill being able to now damage all enemy types

Fist of the Heavens

  • No longer requires Conversion
  • Casting Delay is skill only and lasts 0.3 seconds
  • Synergy for Lightning increased to 15 from 7%
  • Synergy for Holy Bolts increased to 20 from 10%

Holy Shield

  • Added synergy to Zeal and Sacrifice for flat min/max magical damage to help with physical resistant enemies
  • Magic Damage Synergy is 25 flat per point into each skill
  • Damage curve increased by 1 for smite added damage.

sorceress.title: Sorceress
sorceress.content:
General Changes

  • From PR847: Goal is to pull power out of the masteries and put them into the skills and synergies. Initially started because of various OSkills and Enchant, this initial pass is has expanded to feel things out and swing a nerf bat at some outlier skills, and buff up some underperforming or cumbersome ones. Please give each element a try as well as some hybridization, the masteries still provide some power as 1 points, and synergies were cut back to limit them to the skill itself and 2 others and power pushed into the skill level 29+ curve damage instead of bloating the synergies higher. Definitely want a focused elemental build to be stronger, but would like other builds to be viable to at least farm with and have fun doing it.
  • Missile speeds for multiple spells have been increased to ease positioning issues in the high density D2RR environment.

Skill Trees

Cold

Ice Bolt

  • Now gains 1 additional projectile per 5 hard points to a maximum of 5
  • 29+ Curve substantially increased to maintain end game damage
  • Synergy reduced to 12% from 15%
  • Moved left on the Cold Tree
  • Now only has Frost Nova and Frozen Orb synergies

Frozen Armor

  • Now grants 1% physical damage reduction per hard point

Frost Nova

  • Requires level up to 12 from 6
  • Now has Ice Bolt Prerequisite
  • Removed Blizzard Synergy
  • Added Ice Bolt Synergy
  • Increased 29+ damage

Ice Blast

  • Now gains 1 additional projectile per 5 hard points to a maximum of 5
  • Damage Curve reduced 23+
  • Freeze length synergy removed
  • Now only has Glacial Spike and Blizzard synergies

Shiver Armor

  • Now grants 1% physical damage reduction per hard point
  • No longer has Ice Blast prerequisite

Glacial Spike

  • Now gains 1 additional projectile per 8 hard points to a maximum of 3
  • Explosion radius increased slightly
  • 29+ Damage curve increased
  • Damage Synergy increased to 10% from 5%
  • Removed Frozen Orb Synergy
  • Reduced Freeze Length Synergy

Blizzard

  • Casting delay reduced to 1 second
  • Removed Frost Nova Requirement and moved it right 1 column in the cold tree
  • 29+ damage curve increased
  • Synergy reduced to 4% from 5%
  • Removed Ice Bolt Synergy

Chilling Armor

  • Now grants 1% physical damage reduction per hard point
  • Damage synergy increased to 10% from 9%

Frozen Orb

  • Fixed missile flag causing extra visual only explosions by the main orb.
  • Ice bolts cast by the orb and the explosion now explode like glacial spike but only chill
  • Casting delay reduced to 0.6 seconds
  • Damage Curve adjusted back to vanilla values
  • Damage Synergy increased to 4% from 3%
  • Added Frost Nova Synergy

Cold Mastery

  • Now grants 150% Cold Skill Damage with 25 hard points
  • Now grants 150% Cold Skill Damage with 75 soft points
  • Now grants 25% -Enemy Cold Resistance with 25 hard points
  • Now grants 25% -Enemy Cold Resistance with 75 soft points points

 

Lightning

Charged Bolt

  • 23+ damage curve increased
  • Added Synergy with Chain Lightning

Static Field

  • HP% removed per cast reduced to 10% at all levels from 25% at all levels.

Nova

  • 29+ damage curve increased
  • Added Thunder Storm synergy

Lightning

  • Missile Speed increased slightly
  • 23+ minimum damage curve increased
  • 9+ maximum damage curve increased
  • Synergy increased to 14% from 8%
  • Removed Nova Synergy

Chain Lightning

  • Missile Speed increased slightly
  • 23+ minimum damage curve increased
  • 1+ maximum damage curve increased
  • Synergy increased to 8% from 4%
  • Removed Nova Synergy

Thunder Storm

  • Strikes now cast a small Nova dealing damage based on Thunder Storm
  • Decreased minimum time between bolts by .2 seconds (now .8 seconds at around 20 down from 1s)
  • 29+ damage curve increased
  • Synergy increased to 8% from 7%
  • Added Nova Synergy

Energy Shield

  • Reduced maximum absorption cap to 90% from 95%
  • Fixed TK synergy to apply the -6% mana per health to 63% a 12% buff from 75%

Lightning Mastery

  • Now grants 150% Lightning Skill Damage with 25 hard points
  • Now grants 150% Lightning Skill Damage with 75 soft points
  • Now grants 25% -Enemy Lightning Resistance with 25 hard points
  • Now grants 25% -Enemy Lightning Resistance with 75 soft points points

 

Fire

Fire Bolt

  • Now grants 1 additional projectile per 5 hard points up to a maximum of 5
  • Synergy reduced to 14% from 16%

Warmth

  • Mana recovery changed to 15 base 15 per level from 30 base and 12 per level
  • Gains 1 life after each kill per hard point

Inferno

  • Missile speed and range increased slightly
  • Now casts an additional stream of fire every 6 levels (soft points)
  • Fire Wall synergy added
  • Synergies reduced to 10% from 13%
  • Mana cost slightly increased

Blaze

  • 29+ damage curve increased

Fireball

  • Now gains 1 additional projectile per 10 hard points up to a maximum of 3
  • 29+ damage curve increased
  • Synergy reduced to 12% from 14%

Firewall

  • Casting delay reduced to 0.6 seconds
  • Wall creation speed increased by 75% and now deals damage in a larger area within the fire visual
  • 29+ damage curve increased
  • Synergy with Warmth reduced to 3% from 4%

Enchant

  • Damage curve reduced by 5% total
  • Damage Synergy down to 4% from 9%

Meteor

  • Casting delay reduced to 1 second

Hydra

  • Now shoot explosive projectiles
  • 29+ damage curve increased
  • Synergies increased from 3 to 4%

Fire Mastery

  • Now grants 150% Fire Skill Damage with 25 hard points
  • Now grants 150% Fire Skill Damage with 75 soft points
  • Now grants 25% -Enemy Fire Resistance with 25 hard points
  • Now grants 25% -Enemy Fire Resistance with 75 soft points points
